prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, direct/port injection) with a custom Harrop TVS2300 supercharger kit (12psi boost), paired with a Koyoritsu Racing 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 header and dual HKS Hi-Power SP silencers for optimized scavenging and sound tuning.

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a KAAZ 2.5-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the U660E 6-speed automatic transmission, upgraded with a PTT Performance valve body and Sonnax Smart-Tech solenoids for lightning-fast shifts, alongside a custom 3.727 final drive ratio from Torsen for improved acceleration.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) and custom valving for the Voxy's 2WD/AWD chassis, paired with Cusco front strut tower bars, rear subframe brace, and polyurethane bushings (Whiteline for control arms, SuperPro for trailing arms) to eliminate flex and improve turn-in response.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Voxy-specific, 50mm extended fenders) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Veilside Fortune front bumper and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser integrating dual 100mm titanium exhaust tips (Burns Stainless).

Full custom aero package including a Garage Vary carbon fiber GT wing (1,800mm span, 300mm chord) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals, a custom front splitter with integrated canards (APR Performance), and a custom aluminum undertray with vortex generators for downforce optimization.

Interior transformation with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (custom-molded for the Voxy's chassis), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede with quick-release), and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay (Seibon) with a custom 12.3-inch digital gauge cluster (AEM CD-7) replacing the stock instrument panel.
